toolPurpose: Execute a SOQL (Salesforce Object Query Language) query to retrieve records from Salesforce objects with filtering, sorting, and field selection.

query.description: SOQL query string (e.g., 'SELECT Id, Name, Phone FROM Account WHERE Industry = "Technology" ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 100')

toolPurpose: Retrieve a specific Salesforce record by its ID and sObject type, returning all standard and custom fields.

fields.description: Optional array of specific fields to retrieve. If omitted, returns all accessible fields.

toolPurpose: Execute a SOSL (Salesforce Object Search Language) full-text search across multiple sObjects simultaneously.

searchTerm.description: Search term or phrase (e.g., 'Acme Corp', 'John Smith')

sObjectTypes.description: Array of sObject types to search across (e.g., ['Account', 'Contact', 'Lead']). If omitted, searches all searchable objects.

fields.description: Optional array of specific fields to return in results

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return per sObject (default: 20, max: 200)

toolPurpose: List all available sObjects (standard and custom objects) in the Salesforce organization with basic metadata.

query.description: Optional substring to filter object names (e.g., 'Account' returns Account, AccountContactRole, etc.)

toolPurpose: Retrieve detailed metadata for a specific sObject, including field definitions, relationships, permissions, and API access details.
Retrieve recently viewed Salesforce records across all object types, useful for quick access to frequently accessed items.

limit.description: Maximum number of recent items to retrieve (default: 10, max: 200)
